positive.stdout:

cnf(u20,axiom,
    legend_of_zelda != fifa_22).

cnf(u23,negated_conjecture,

cnf(u24,axiom,
    top10(legend_of_zelda)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    nintendo != fifa_22).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    created(nintendo,legend_of_zelda)).

    created(sK0(X0),X0) | ~top10(X0)).

    japanese_company(nintendo)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    sells_over_million(legend_of_zelda)).

cnf(u26,negated_conjecture,
    ~top10(fifa_22)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~sells_over_million(X0) | top10(X0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    japanese_company(sK0(X0)) | ~top10(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    nintendo != legend_of_zelda).

% SZS output end Saturation.

% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
